Function Documentation

◆ addByteCountSuffix()

void addByteCountSuffix ( raw_ostream & OS,
const Function * F,
const DataLayout & TD )
static

Microsoft fastcall and stdcall functions require a suffix on their name indicating the number of words of arguments they take.
